summary: Testing completed for Creator Store and Provider Integration features. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working. Minor issue found: MarketplaceListing creator link uses user_id instead of store slug.

integration_issues.issue: Creator name link in MarketplaceListing.jsx uses `/store/${listing.creator_id}` but the store page API expects a slug, not user_id. Clicking 'Test User' link shows 404 'Store not found'

tests: test_other_lms_providers_coming_soon - PASS (Canvas, Clever, ClassLink, PowerSchool, Schoology show 'Coming Soon')
test_file_import_providers_available - PASS (CTF and CSV import available)

marketplace_listing_page.creator_name_with_link: PASS - shows 'by Test User' with link

integrations_page.region_tabs: PASS - All(16), Global(3), US(8), UK(8), Import(2)
integrations_page.uk_providers: PASS - Arbor, SIMS, Bromcom, ScholarPack, iSAMS
integrations_page.us_providers: PASS - Clever, ClassLink, PowerSchool, Schoology, Alma SIS

action_items: LOW PRIORITY: Fix MarketplaceListing.jsx line 314 - change `/store/${listing.creator_id}` to use store slug instead of user ID. The backend needs to either: (a) return store_slug in the marketplace listing response, or (b) add an endpoint that accepts user_id and redirects to store slug
seed_data_creation: Used existing store 'test-teacher-games' with slug test-teacher-games
